title: wrong scoping for cross-schema view references
bug_features_seed: CREATE TABLE s1 (id INTEGER PRIMARY KEY, name TEXT);
CREATE TABLE s2 (id INTEGER PRIMARY KEY, description TEXT, created_at DATETIME DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP);
CREATE TABLE s3 (x INTEGER CHECK (x > 0), y REAL DEFAULT NULL);
SELECT * FROM s3 WHERE x IN (SELECT id FROM s1 WHERE name IS NOT NULL);
key_bug_features: cross-schema view references with incorrect scoping
